profile.title: My Profile
profile.signInDesc: Sign in to sync your progress across devices and access your profile.
profile.noWorkshopsYet: Start a workshop to track your progress here.
profile.learningGoalPlaceholder: Why are you learning? What do you want to achieve?

home.title: Learn anything. For free. On your terms.
home.subtitle: No account, no ads, no tracking. Your data stays in your browser — always.
home.getStartedDesc: Select your language in the top-left dropdown to see available workshops.
home.whatYouCanLearnDesc: Open Learn is not limited to languages. Any knowledge that can be structured into lessons with questions and answers works.
home.forCreatorsDesc: Workshops are written in simple YAML — no code needed. Host them on GitHub Pages, IPFS, or any URL. Learners add them with a single link.
home.roadmapDesc: Open Learn is actively developed. Here are some of the features we're working on:
home.openSourceDesc: Open Learn is open source and free. View the code, report issues, or contribute.
home.forCreatorsLink: Learn how to create a workshop

features.anySubjectDesc: Languages, math, driving theory, music — if it can be structured, it can be learned here
features.richExperienceDesc: Videos, audio with variable speed, interactive quizzes, multiple-choice, and progress tracking
features.yourContentDesc: Write workshops in simple YAML. Host on GitHub, IPFS, or any URL. Share with a link
features.zeroInfraDesc: Runs as a static site. No server, no database. Works offline. Optional P2P sync across devices

steps.pickLangDesc: Choose the language you already know — workshops will be presented in it.
steps.startWorkshopDesc: Click any workshop and start immediately — no sign-up required.
steps.learnTrackDesc: Answer questions, listen to audio, mark items learned — all saved locally.

tools.assessmentsDesc: Free-text input, multiple-choice, single-select, and classic Q&A flashcards
tools.audioDesc: MP3 pronunciation with variable speed (0.6×–1.0×), lock screen controls, and auto-play
tools.videoDesc: YouTube videos and local video files embedded directly into lessons
tools.progressDesc: Mark vocabulary and concepts as learned. Progress visible per lesson and workshop
tools.coachDesc: Optionally forward answers to an external coach service — for feedback and evaluation
tools.syncDesc: Sync progress across devices peer-to-peer — no central server needed

privacy.localDesc: Progress, settings, and answers stay in your browser. Nothing is sent to a server.
privacy.noTrackingDesc: No cookies, no analytics, no ads. We don't know who you are.
privacy.yourDataDesc: Export and import your data anytime as JSON. You're in full control.

roadmap.aiCoachDesc: An autonomous coach agent that gives feedback, evaluates progress, and suggests personalized learning paths.
roadmap.kidsModeDesc: Simplified interface for children — fewer buttons, larger elements, guided learning.
roadmap.imagesDesc: Screenshots and images as section headers — for step-by-step guides and visual explanations.
roadmap.i18nDesc: The entire platform in any language — including right-to-left support for Arabic and Farsi.
roadmap.uploadsDesc: Upload PDFs, scripts, and other documents as learning material.

settings.accountSyncDesc: Sign in to sync your progress across devices in the same network. No server required.
settings.darkModeDesc: Dark color scheme for comfortable reading at night
settings.showAnswersDesc: Show or hide answer translations in lessons
settings.showLearningItemsDesc: Show or hide vocabulary and related items
settings.showLabelsDesc: Show or hide grammar labels (Futur, Gerundium, etc.)
settings.hideLearnedExamplesDesc: Automatically hide examples where all vocabulary items are learned
settings.readAnswersDesc: Include answer translations when auto-reading lessons
settings.noDataYet: No data yet. Start learning to track your progress.

coachView.noCoach: No coach configured for this workshop.
coachView.description: Ask questions about the workshop, get feedback on your answers, or request help.

addSource.alreadyAddedDesc: This content source is already in your library.
